decisions.rationale: Original Damask is GTK, mature bindings, native GNOME experience
Enables future UI toolkit swap (Iced for COSMIC), better architecture
Reduces complexity for MVP, two most reliable API sources
Automatic refresh adds complexity; auto-refresh deferred to v2
Prioritize working MVP over test coverage for learning project
User runs both DEs, wallpaper setting APIs differ

context_notes: Phase 1 (Core Engine Foundation) completed successfully. All 6 requirements verified. Phase 2 (Desktop Environment Integration) needs planning. No plans exist yet for Phase 2.
